title: Worst-case comparison count of insertion sort
statement_informal: Sorting a list of length n by insertion sort performs at most n(n-1)/2 key comparisons.

cost_model.notes: Each x <=? y test in the instrumented insert counts as one comparison; the count is threaded through structural recursion.

references: Software Foundations, Vol. 3: Verified Functional Algorithms (Appel) — functional correctness of insertion sort
Charguéraud & Pottier, 'A Fistful of Dollars' — formal verification of asymptotic cost via time credits
